creator: gavin@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->feedback

Hi, 

Can you please give some more details about what you are seeing?  I 
caon't recreate this at all.  At what stage does sysinstall crash? 
Do you see any menus, or does it die before it shows anything? 
Is there anything unusual about your system that might mean that 
you see this but others don't?
